name: Beans with Rare Steak and Pesto (Rr)
recipeIngredient: 3 cups aromatic cannellini beans - master recipe
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove the steak and beans from the refrigerator to take off a bit of the chill.
2. Meanwhile, prepare a pesto by placing the basil, parsley, garlic, and Parmesan in a food processor fitted with the metal blade. Process until finely chopped, then scrape down the sides of the bowl. With the motor running, pour in the olive oil, then the water, in a thin stream.
3. Mix the beans with half the pesto and season with salt.
4. Set beans and remaining pesto aside.
5. Season the steak on both sides with salt and pepper. Grill, turning once, until just rare in the center, about 12 minutes total. Remove from the grill and let stand for 5 minutes, then cut across the grain into very thin slices.
6. Divide the beans among dinner plates. Top with 2-3 slices of grilled steak and drizzle with some of the remaining pesto.
This may serve 6 in your family -- it only serves 4 in mine.
Suggested Wine: Australian Shiraz-Cabernet
